text:
is the third concept single for the Attack on Titan anime. It was composed and written by singer/songwriter Revo of , and released on June 19th, 2019. Both editions have the same 2 songs, but different bonus tracks.

Trivia

There is a strong theme of winter in this single, representing death.
This is the first time a voice actor of the show has sung a Linked Horizon song.
13 no Fuyu features musical references to both Die Flügel der Freiheit (the melody of the chorus is taken from the stanza that begins with "'tori' wa tobu tame ni") and a Sound Horizon song, Asa to Yoru no Roman. This is the first time an outside song was referenced specifically, and it is used to highlight the "winter is death" metaphor, but also the uncertainty of Eren Jaeger's fate.
The bonus song contained in th eregular edition:
Is the first hidden bonus song to contain lyrics.
Has no title, only an instruction to choose a title for it yourself.
Has sound effects from a Sound Horizon bonus song, Rin∞ne. This song is also about a child yet to be born, with the sound effects corresponding to different words, just like this bonus song.
The limited edition's packaging features a box with a snowy version of Eren's house and basement, while the CD cover underneath features a dilapidated version of Eren's house and basement without the snow, like seen in the anime.
The art for the lyrics' pages is:
The snow falling from the sky for 13 no Fuyu.
A road of bones with the lyrics laid over for Shoukei to Shikabane no Michi.
